  "mock_files": {
    "mock_egtm_atom_3_phase_inverter_pwm.h": "/* AUTOGENERATED BASE MOCK HEADER — EGTM ATOM 3-PHASE INVERTER PWM (TC4xx)\n * Single-owner base types + MODULE_* stubs + shared enums + spy API only\n */\n#ifndef MOCK_EGTM_ATOM_3_PHASE_INVERTER_PWM_H\n#define MOCK_EGTM_ATOM_3_PHASE_INVERTER_PWM_H\n\n/* Base type aliases */\ntypedef float               float32;\ntypedef unsigned long       uint32;\ntypedef signed long         sint32;\ntypedef unsigned char       uint8;\ntypedef unsigned short      uint16;\ntypedef signed short        sint16;\ntypedef unsigned char       boolean;\ntypedef unsigned char       Ifx_Priority;  /* priority fits into 8-bit for mock */\n\ntypedef uint32 Ifx_UReg_32Bit;            /* SFR 32-bit type stub */\n\n/* Macros */\n#ifndef TRUE\n# define TRUE  ((boolean)1)\n#endif\n#ifndef FALSE\n# define FALSE ((boolean)0)\n#endif\n#ifndef NULL_PTR\n# define NULL_PTR ((void*)0)\n#endif\n#ifndef IFX_STATIC\n# define IFX_STATIC static\n#endif\n#ifndef IFX_INTERRUPT\n# define IFX_INTERRUPT(isr_name, vectab_num, priority) void isr_name(void)\n#endif\n\n/* Shared enums used across multiple drivers */\ntypedef enum {\n    Ifx_ActiveState_low  = 0,\n    Ifx_ActiveState_high = 1\n} Ifx_ActiveState;\n\ntypedef enum {\n    IfxSrc_Tos_cpu0 = 0,\n    IfxSrc_Tos_cpu1 = 1,\n    IfxSrc_Tos_dma  = 2\n} IfxSrc_Tos;\n\ntypedef enum {\n    IfxSrc_VmId_0 = 0,\n    IfxSrc_VmId_1 = 1,\n    IfxSrc_VmId_2 = 2\n} IfxSrc_VmId;\n\n/* MODULE_* register-block stubs (typedef + extern) */\ntypedef struct { uint32 reserved; } Ifx_EGTM;\ntypedef struct { uint32 reserved; } Ifx_EGTM_CLS;\ntypedef struct { uint32 reserved; } Ifx_ADC;\ntypedef struct { uint32 reserved; } Ifx_P;\n\ntypedef struct { uint32 reserved; } Ifx_GTM; /* legacy compatibility if needed */\n\n/* Required extern module instances for this module */\nextern Ifx_EGTM MODULE_EGTM;\nextern Ifx_ADC  MODULE_ADC;\nextern Ifx_P    MODULE_P20;\nextern Ifx_P    MODULE_P33;\n\n/* Spy API (counters, return-value controls, capture buffers) */\n#define MOCK_MAX_CHANNELS 16\n\n/* Primary PWM driver init/initConfig capture */\nextern uint32  mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_lastNumChannels;\nextern float32 mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_lastFrequency;\nextern uint32  mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_lastNumChannels;\nextern float32 mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_lastFrequency;\n\n/* Duty update capture */\nextern float32 mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[MOCK_MAX_CHANNELS];\nextern float32 mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDtRising[MOCK_MAX_CHANNELS];\nextern float32 mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDtFalling[MOCK_MAX_CHANNELS];\n\n/* Call counters (int — keep consistent across header/c file) */\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_enableClocks_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_isEnabled_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_enable_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxPort_togglePin_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxPort_setPinModeOutput_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxAdc_isTmadcResultAvailable_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxAdc_clearTmadcResultFlag_callCount;\n/* Additional CMU API counters */\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency_callCount;\nextern int mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency_callCount;\n\n/* Return-value controls */\nextern boolean mock_IfxEgtm_isEnabled_returnValue;\nextern boolean mock_IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc_returnValue;\nextern boolean mock_IfxAdc_isTmadcResultAvailable_returnValue;\nextern boolean mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_isEnabled_returnValue;\nextern float32 mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_returnValue;\nextern float32 mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency_returnValue;\n\n/* Convenience toggle counter alias required by tests */\nextern int mock_togglePin_callCount; /* same storage as mock_IfxPort_togglePin_callCount */\n\n/* Mock control API */\nvoid mock_egtm_atom_3_phase_inverter_pwm_reset(void);\n\n/* Per-function getters (required by tests) */\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_enableClocks_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxEgtm_isEnabled_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxEgtm_enable_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxPort_togglePin_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxPort_setPinModeOutput_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxAdc_isTmadcResultAvailable_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxAdc_clearTmadcResultFlag_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency_getCallCount(void);\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency_getCallCount(void);\n\n#endif /* MOCK_EGTM_ATOM_3_PHASE_INVERTER_PWM_H */\n",
    "mock_egtm_atom_3_phase_inverter_pwm.c": "/* AUTOGENERATED BASE MOCK SOURCE — EGTM ATOM 3-PHASE INVERTER PWM (TC4xx) */\n#include \"mock_egtm_atom_3_phase_inverter_pwm.h\"\n#include \"IfxEgtm.h\"\n#include \"IfxEgtm_Cmu.h\"\n#include \"IfxEgtm_Pwm.h\"\n#include \"IfxEgtm_Trigger.h\"\n#include \"IfxAdc.h\"\n#include \"IfxPort.h\"\n#include \"IfxPort_Pinmap.h\"\n\n/* MODULE_* instances */\nIfx_EGTM MODULE_EGTM = {0};\nIfx_ADC  MODULE_ADC  = {0};\nIfx_P    MODULE_P20  = {0};\nIfx_P    MODULE_P33  = {0};\n\n/* Required pin symbol definitions */\nIfxEgtm_Pwm_ToutMap IfxEgtm_ATOM0_0N_TOUT65_P20_9_OUT  = {0};\nIfxEgtm_Pwm_ToutMap IfxEgtm_ATOM0_0_TOUT64_P20_8_OUT   = {0};\nIfxEgtm_Pwm_ToutMap IfxEgtm_ATOM0_1N_TOUT67_P20_11_OUT = {0};\nIfxEgtm_Pwm_ToutMap IfxEgtm_ATOM0_1_TOUT66_P20_10_OUT  = {0};\nIfxEgtm_Pwm_ToutMap IfxEgtm_ATOM0_2N_TOUT69_P20_13_OUT = {0};\nIfxEgtm_Pwm_ToutMap IfxEgtm_ATOM0_2_TOUT68_P20_12_OUT  = {0};\nIfxEgtm_Pwm_ToutMap IfxEgtm_ATOM0_3_TOUT22_P33_0_OUT   = {0};\n\n/* Spy storage */\nuint32  mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_lastNumChannels = 0;\nfloat32 mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_lastFrequency   = 0.0f;\nuint32  mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_lastNumChannels = 0;\nfloat32 mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_lastFrequency   = 0.0f;\n\nfloat32 mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[MOCK_MAX_CHANNELS] = {0};\nfloat32 mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDtRising[MOCK_MAX_CHANNELS] = {0};\nfloat32 mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDtFalling[MOCK_MAX_CHANNELS] = {0};\n\n/* Call counters */\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_enableClocks_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxEgtm_isEnabled_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxEgtm_enable_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxPort_togglePin_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxPort_setPinModeOutput_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxAdc_isTmadcResultAvailable_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxAdc_clearTmadcResultFlag_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency_callCount = 0;\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency_callCount = 0;\n\n/* Return-value controls */\nboolean mock_IfxEgtm_isEnabled_returnValue = FALSE;\nboolean mock_IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc_returnValue = FALSE;\nboolean mock_IfxAdc_isTmadcResultAvailable_returnValue = FALSE;\nboolean mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_isEnabled_returnValue = FALSE;\nfloat32 mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_returnValue = 0.0f;\nfloat32 mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency_returnValue   = 0.0f;\n\n/* internal bounded copy state */\nstatic uint32 _captured_numChannels = 0;\n\n/* Stub bodies — do not access struct members except the allowed config capture */\nvoid IfxEgtm_Pwm_init(IfxEgtm_Pwm *pwm, IfxEgtm_Pwm_Channel *channels, IfxEgtm_Pwm_Config *config)\n{\n    (void)pwm; (void)channels;\n    mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_callCount++;\n    if (config != NULL_PTR) {\n        mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_lastNumChannels = (uint32)config->numChannels;\n        mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_lastFrequency   = config->frequency;\n        _captured_numChannels = (uint32)config->numChannels;\n    }\n}\n\nvoid IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig(IfxEgtm_Pwm_Config *config, Ifx_EGTM *egtmSFR)\n{\n    (void)egtmSFR;\n    mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_callCount++;\n    if (config != NULL_PTR) {\n        mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_lastNumChannels = (uint32)config->numChannels;\n        mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_lastFrequency   = config->frequency;\n        _captured_numChannels = (uint32)config->numChannels;\n    }\n}\n\nvoid IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate(IfxEgtm_Pwm *pwm, float32 *requestDuty)\n{\n    (void)pwm;\n    mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_callCount++;\n    uint32 n = (_captured_numChannels > 0 && _captured_numChannels <= MOCK_MAX_CHANNELS) ? _captured_numChannels : MOCK_MAX_CHANNELS;\n    if (requestDuty != NULL_PTR) {\n        for (uint32 i = 0; i < n; ++i) {\n            mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_lastDuties[i] = requestDuty[i];\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nvoid IfxEgtm_Cmu_enableClocks(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, uint32 clkMask)\n{ (void)egtm; (void)clkMask; mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_enableClocks_callCount++; }\n\n/* Additional CMU mocks required by template */\nvoid IfxEgtm_Cmu_enable(Ifx_EGTM *module) { (void)module; }\nboolean IfxEgtm_Cmu_isEnabled(Ifx_EGTM *module) { (void)module; return mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_isEnabled_returnValue; }\nfloat32 IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm)\n{ (void)egtm; mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_callCount++; return (mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_returnValue != 0.0f) ? mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_returnValue : 100000000.0f; }\nfloat32 IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm)\n{ (void)egtm; mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency_callCount++; return (mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency_returnValue != 0.0f) ? mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency_returnValue : 100000000.0f; }\nfloat32 IfxEgtm_Cmu_getClkFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk clkIndex, boolean assumeEnabled)\n{ (void)egtm; (void)clkIndex; (void)assumeEnabled; return 0.0f; }\nfloat32 IfxEgtm_Cmu_getEclkFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Eclk eclk)\n{ (void)egtm; (void)eclk; return 0.0f; }\nfloat32 IfxEgtm_Cmu_getFxClkFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Fxclk fx)\n{ (void)egtm; (void)fx; return 0.0f; }\nvoid IfxEgtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, float32 frequency)\n{ (void)egtm; (void)frequency; mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency_callCount++; }\nvoid IfxEgtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk clkIndex, float32 frequency)\n{ (void)egtm; (void)clkIndex; (void)frequency; mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency_callCount++; }\nvoid IfxEgtm_Cmu_setEclkDivider(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Eclk eclk, uint32 div)\n{ (void)egtm; (void)eclk; (void)div; }\nvoid IfxEgtm_Cmu_setGclkDivider(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, uint32 div)\n{ (void)egtm; (void)div; }\nvoid IfxEgtm_Cmu_setEclkFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Eclk eclk, float32 f)\n{ (void)egtm; (void)eclk; (void)f; }\n\nboolean IfxEgtm_isEnabled(Ifx_EGTM *egtm)\n{ (void)egtm; mock_IfxEgtm_isEnabled_callCount++; return mock_IfxEgtm_isEnabled_returnValue; }\nvoid IfxEgtm_enable(Ifx_EGTM *egtm)\n{ (void)egtm; mock_IfxEgtm_enable_callCount++; }\n\nboolean IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc(IfxEgtm_Cluster egtmCluster, IfxEgtm_TrigSource egtmSource, IfxEgtm_TrigChannel Channel, IfxEgtm_Cfg_AdcTriggerSignal adcTrigSignal)\n{ (void)egtmCluster; (void)egtmSource; (void)Channel; (void)adcTrigSignal; mock_IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc_callCount++; return mock_IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc_returnValue; }\n\nboolean IfxAdc_isTmadcResultAvailable(Ifx_ADC_TMADC *tmadc, IfxAdc_TmadcResultReg resultRegNum)\n{ (void)tmadc; (void)resultRegNum; mock_IfxAdc_isTmadcResultAvailable_callCount++; return mock_IfxAdc_isTmadcResultAvailable_returnValue; }\nvoid IfxAdc_clearTmadcResultFlag(Ifx_ADC_TMADC *tmadc, IfxAdc_TmadcResultReg resultRegNum)\n{ (void)tmadc; (void)resultRegNum; mock_IfxAdc_clearTmadcResultFlag_callCount++; }\n\nvoid IfxPort_togglePin(Ifx_P *port, uint8 pinIndex)\n{ (void)port; (void)pinIndex; mock_IfxPort_togglePin_callCount++; }\nvoid IfxPort_setPinModeOutput(Ifx_P *port, uint8 pinIndex, IfxPort_OutputMode mode, IfxPort_OutputIdx index)\n{ (void)port; (void)pinIndex; (void)mode; (void)index; mock_IfxPort_setPinModeOutput_callCount++; }\n\n/* Getters */\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_enableClocks_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_enableClocks_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxEgtm_isEnabled_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_isEnabled_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxEgtm_enable_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_enable_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxPort_togglePin_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxPort_togglePin_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxPort_setPinModeOutput_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxPort_setPinModeOutput_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_Trigger_trigToAdc_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxAdc_isTmadcResultAvailable_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxAdc_isTmadcResultAvailable_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxAdc_clearTmadcResultFlag_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxAdc_clearTmadcResultFlag_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency_callCount; }\nint mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency_getCallCount(void) { return mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency_callCount; }\n\n/* Reset state */\nvoid mock_egtm_atom_3_phase_inverter_pwm_reset(void)\n{\n    mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_init_callCount = 0;\n    mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_initConfig_callCount = 0;\n    mock_IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate_callCount = 0;\n    mock_IfxEgtm_Cmu_enableClocks_callCount = 0;\n    mock_IfxEgtm_isEnabled_callCount = 0;\n    mock_IfxEgtm_enable_callCount = 0;\n    mock_IfxPort_togglePin_callCount = 0;\n */\ntypedef enum { IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscSet_a = 0 } IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscSet;\ntypedef enum { IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscSetSignal_0 = 0 } IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscSetSignal;\ntypedef enum { IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscModule_0 = 0 } IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscModule;\ntypedef enum { IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscSelect_0 = 0 } IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscSelect;\n\n/* Irq mode per template */\ntypedef enum {\n    IfxEgtm_IrqMode_level       = 0,\n    IfxEgtm_IrqMode_pulse       = 1,\n    IfxEgtm_IrqMode_pulseNotify = 2,\n    IfxEgtm_IrqMode_singlePulse = 3\n} IfxEgtm_IrqMode;\n\ntypedef enum {\n    IfxEgtm_AeiBridgeOpMode_sync  = 0u,\n    IfxEgtm_AeiBridgeOpMode_async = 1u\n} IfxEgtm_AeiBridgeOpMode;\n\ntypedef enum {\n    IfxEgtm_ClusterClockDiv_disable    = 0u,\n    IfxEgtm_ClusterClockDiv_enable     = 1u,\n    IfxEgtm_ClusterClockDiv_enableDiv2 = 2u\n} IfxEgtm_ClusterClockDiv;\n\ntypedef enum {\n    IfxEgtm_MscAltInput_low     = 0,\n    IfxEgtm_MscAltInput_lowext  = 1,\n    IfxEgtm_MscAltInput_high    = 2,\n    IfxEgtm_MscAltInput_highext = 3\n} IfxEgtm_MscAltInput;\n\ntypedef enum {\n    IfxEgtm_SuspendMode_none = 0,\n    IfxEgtm_SuspendMode_hard = 1,\n    IfxEgtm_SuspendMode_soft = 2\n} IfxEgtm_SuspendMode;\n\n/* Cluster enum (single-owner here to avoid redeclarations) */\ntypedef enum {\n    IfxEgtm_Cluster_0 = 0,\n    IfxEgtm_Cluster_1 = 1,\n    IfxEgtm_Cluster_2 = 2\n} IfxEgtm_Cluster;\n\n/* Additional trigger-related enums for IfxEgtm_Trigger prototype */\ntypedef enum { IfxEgtm_TrigSource_0 = 0 } IfxEgtm_TrigSource;\ntypedef enum { IfxEgtm_TrigChannel_0 = 0 } IfxEgtm_TrigChannel;\ntypedef enum { IfxEgtm_Cfg_AdcTriggerSignal_0 = 0 } IfxEgtm_Cfg_AdcTriggerSignal;\n\n/* MscOut struct as per template */\ntypedef struct {\n    IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscSet       mscSet;\n    IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscSetSignal mscSetSignal;\n    IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscModule    mscModule;\n    IfxEgtm_Cfg_MscSelect    mscSelect;\n    IfxEgtm_MscAltInput      mscAltIn;\n} IfxEgtm_MscOut;\n\n/* Minimal API used by module */\nvoid    IfxEgtm_enable(Ifx_EGTM *egtm);\nboolean IfxEgtm_isEnabled(Ifx_EGTM *egtm);\n\n#endif /* IFXEGTM_H */\n",
    "IfxEgtm_Cmu.h": "/* AUTOGENERATED MOCK — IfxEgtm_Cmu.h (TC4xx) */\n#ifndef IFXEGTM_CMU_H\n#define IFXEGTM_CMU_H\n#include \"mock_egtm_atom_3_phase_inverter_pwm.h\"\n\n/* Enable macros */\n#ifndef IFXEGTM_CMU_CLKEN_FXCLK\n# define IFXEGTM_CMU_CLKEN_FXCLK (0x1u)\n#endif\n#ifndef IFXEGTM_CMU_CLKEN_CLK0\n# define IFXEGTM_CMU_CLKEN_CLK0  (0x2u)\n#endif\n\n/* Enums */\ntypedef enum {\n    IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk_0 = 0, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk_1, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk_2, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk_3,\n    IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk_4, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk_5, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk_6, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk_7\n} IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk;\n\ntypedef enum { IfxEgtm_Cmu_Eclk_0 = 0, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Eclk_1, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Eclk_2 } IfxEgtm_Cmu_Eclk;\n\ntypedef enum { IfxEgtm_Cmu_Fxclk_0 = 0, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Fxclk_1, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Fxclk_2, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Fxclk_3, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Fxclk_4 } IfxEgtm_Cmu_Fxclk;\n\ntypedef enum { IfxEgtm_Cmu_Tim_Filter_Clk_0 = 0, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Tim_Filter_Clk_1, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Tim_Filter_Clk_6 } IfxEgtm_Cmu_Tim_Filter_Clk;\n\n/* Decls */\nvoid    IfxEgtm_Cmu_enableClocks(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, uint32 clkMask);\nvoid    IfxEgtm_Cmu_enable(Ifx_EGTM *module);\nboolean IfxEgtm_Cmu_isEnabled(Ifx_EGTM *module);\nfloat32 IfxEgtm_Cmu_getGclkFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm);\nfloat32 IfxEgtm_Cmu_getModuleFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm);\nboolean IfxEgtm_Cmu_isClkClockEnabled(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk clkIndex);\nboolean IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk clkIndex);\nvoid    IfxEgtm_Cmu_setClkCount(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk clkIndex, uint32 count);\nvoid    IfxEgtm_Cmu_setEclkDivider(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Eclk eclk, uint32 divider);\nvoid    IfxEgtm_Cmu_setGclkDivider(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, uint32 divider);\nfloat32 IfxEgtm_Cmu_getClkFrequency(Ifx_EGTM *egtm, IfxEgtm_Cmu_Clk clkIndex, boolean assumeEnabled);\nfloat32
